name: Cipher (Optional March 7th), Secret Quickie || Honkai: Star Rail
description:
“It’s so convincing, how you breathe down my neck. I’m back to you like I’m so sure that the ego side is my best, and I’m back to honor that.”

Cipher time!

I’m making the scenario somewhat different from the image. The original is in a car, and this one is in the astral express.

I’m also making 3 different intro messages! First is for malepov, second for fempov. The third is… well, you’ll see.

Do you like Cipher/Cifera? Do you like catgirls? Do you like really horny and flirty catgirls? Do you like getting head? This is just the bot for you!

Credit for the lorebooks is, of course, the goat HearthFaith.

MISFIT’S TAVERN! (Link is embedded)

I am affiliated with Misfit’s Tavern! Please join, it’s full of really fun and welcoming people! I have my own personal channel where all news of my bots are. If you want to stay updated on me, that’s where you’d want to go!
